posts.author: NHall (Nathan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Is there any current way to get how many days a timeline item is overdue using the Monday API?

Currently we are just getting how many days are between the ‘from’ and ‘updated_at’ on the Timeline documentation.

However, we are noticing not all items match what it says online. Is there a way to get the number we see online when you hover over an item that is overdue?

Thanks,
Nathan.
